meaning: vt.[瓒崇悆]鐢ㄥ亣鍔ㄤ綔璇变娇(瀵规柟鐞冨憳)绂讳綅
examples: In the bar upstairs, a juke-box started up loudly.
There were urban landscapes and rural, diners and flags and juke boxes, kids and cars.
Sometimes the juke box would come on; sometimes you could hear voices and laughter coming from the bar.
Consider the Samsung Juke, which Verizon released in October in red, aqua and royal blue.
Came out of a juke joint one time and just--Milton was standing outside like he was meditating.
